x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Scheduled jobs power AIROP assessment automation, CMDB health scoring, and PI model training. Failed or disabled jobs silently degrade the data quality Now Assist depends on.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review scheduled job health via sysauto_script_list.do. Investigate any jobs with Error or Skipped status. Ensure critical jobs (CMDB Health, PI Training, Discovery) are scheduled and running successfully.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c35
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Scheduled jobs power AIROP assessment automation, CMDB health scoring, and PI model training. Failed or disabled jobs silently degrade the data quality Now Assist depends on.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Scheduled Job Health</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaActive = new GlideAggregate('sysauto_script');
    gaActive.addQuery('active', true);
    gaActive.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaActive.query();
    var active = gaActive.next() ? parseInt(gaActive.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaErrored = new GlideAggregate('sys_trigger');
    gaErrored.addQuery('state', 'error');
    gaErrored.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaErrored.query();
    var errored = gaErrored.next() ? parseInt(gaErrored.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = active + ' active scheduled jobs | ' + errored + ' in error state';

    if (errored === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'All scheduled jobs are healthy. Background data quality processes (CMDB Health, PI Training, Discovery) are running successfully — Now Assist AI has current data to work with.'
        };
    } else if (errored <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: errored + ' scheduled job(s) are in error state. Failed jobs may silently degrade CMDB health scores, PI model training, and other data quality processes that Now Assist depends on.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: errored + ' scheduled jobs are in error state. High error rate indicates systemic scheduled job failures — background data quality processes that Now Assist depends on are likely degraded.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000493</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Review scheduled job health via sysauto_script_list.do. Investigate any jobs with Error or Skipped status. Ensure critical jobs (CMDB Health, PI Training, Discovery) are scheduled and running successfully.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>c7f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c35</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Scheduled Job Health</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c7f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c35</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
